title: eremophila eriocalyx
intro: Eremophila eriocalyx, also known as Lemon Sage, is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae, native to Western Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Eremophila eriocalyx include its ability to soothe sore throats, calm digestive issues, and reduce stress and anxiety. Eremophila eriocalyx can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be taken as a supplement to promote overall well-being.
